scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && shx mkdir -p dist/skills/bundled dist/catalog dist/tools/process dist/assembly/hcp-process dist/process-tools/src && shx cp -r skills/bundled/* dist/skills/bundled/ && shx cp catalog/*.toml catalog/*.json dist/catalog/ && shx cp tools/process/*.toml dist/tools/process/ && shx cp assembly/hcp-process/*.toml dist/assembly/hcp-process/ && shx cp process-tools/Cargo.toml process-tools/Cargo.lock process-tools/README.md dist/process-tools/ && shx cp process-tools/src/*.rs dist/process-tools/src/
